tools.name: vault_list_secrets
tools.description: Lists the names of secrets stored in the user vault. Returns names only — never reveals secret values. Use this to discover what credentials or API keys have been stored.

tools.name: vault_get_secret
tools.description: Retrieves a secret value from the user vault by name. Only use when the user explicitly requests a credential or the agent needs to pass it directly to another system. Never log or echo secret values to the user unless specifically asked.

name.description: The name of the secret to retrieve (e.g. 'BraveSearchApiKey', 'GitHubPat')

tools.name: vault_store_secret
tools.description: Stores or updates a secret in the user vault. Use this to save API keys, PATs, or other credentials the user wants the agent to hold securely. Always requires explicit user consent before storing.

name.description: Secret name (alphanumeric and hyphens only, e.g. 'BraveSearchApiKey')

value.description: The secret value to store securely

tools.name: vault_delete_secret
tools.description: Soft-deletes a secret from the user vault. The secret enters a 90-day recovery window before permanent destruction. Use only when the user explicitly wants to remove a stored credential.

name.description: The name of the secret to delete

shortDescription: Secure user vault for API keys, PATs, and other credentials — backed by Azure Key Vault
orchestratorUseCases: store and retrieve user API keys and credentials securely
manage skill-specific secrets like Brave Search API key or GitHub PAT
provide a user-controlled credentials store for third-party integrations
